name: Gunnison Copper Corp.
description: Gunnison Copper Corp., formerly known as Excelsior Mining Corp., is a mineral exploration and development company focused on copper production. The company's flagship project is the Gunnison Copper Project, located in Cochise County, Arizona, which is designed as a low-cost, environmentally friendly in-situ recovery copper extraction operation. Gunnison Copper Corp. is committed to producing copper with a low carbon footprint to support the global transition to clean energy.
